title: Resource Gamma Util / Fullbright
description: Gamma / Fullbright, making it easy to see in the dark.
body: ## Simple and clean Gamma Mod for all Mod Loader without any fancy settings. ### Features: - Press `H` to activate Fullbright - KeyBind is configurable ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Stein-N/resources/main/images/resource_gamma_utils/resource_gamma_util_example.gif)
